title: glyceria distans var. convoluta
intro: Glyceria distans var. convoluta, also known as convoluted mannagrass or convoluted gypsy grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Glyceria distans var. convoluta include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Glyceria distans var. convoluta typically involve drying the plant material and using it to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
